data.content:
Plan:
1) Inspect terminal tabs component/CSS to find wrapping behavior and existing keyboard/navigation patterns.
2) Implement a constrained-width tabs experience that prevents wrapping (single-line tabs), truncates labels to a compact beat-id form under tight widths, and adds horizontal scrolling with left/right affordances (mouse + keyboard).
3) Preserve existing interaction semantics and active-tab visibility (auto-scroll active into view).
4) Add/adjust tests for overflow handling and truncation behavior where coverage exists.
5) Run quality gates (lint, typecheck, test, build) and land on main.
